prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm light falls across a soiled cream robe and a lifted face, while the sky behind is deep blue-black with a darkened ringed sun; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
The crucified Christ is set against a rough wooden cross, his arms outstretched along the beam, robed in a soiled cream garment knotted at the waist, his bearded face lifted and his gaze turned upward. Behind him a deep blue sky holds a darkened ringed sun at the right; an open scroll rests on a stand at the left, and small distant soldiers stand at the lower-right. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the crucified figure, arms outstretched, the darkened sky behind.

Cut to mid framing — the upper body and lifted face against the wooden cross.

Cut to close-up — the bearded face, gaze turned upward.

Cut to insert — the open scroll resting on its stand at the left.

Cut to insert — the outstretched hand at the end of the arm along the cross-beam.

Cut to upper framing — the darkened ringed sun in the deep blue sky at the right.

Cut to lower framing — the soiled cream robe knotted at the waist.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the lifted face against the cross.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Sorrowful surrender — the plan, not an accident.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
